title: Install server and build dependencies
prompt:
You are contributing to a larger software project using a task plan.
Focus strictly on the described subtask while respecting existing files.
Build upon the code from previous subtasks - the file contents are provided below.
Provide ALL files that should exist after this subtask (including updated versions of existing files).
If tests are needed, include them and mark hasTests=true.
Respond with JSON following the executor schema (project_name, files, notes, hasTests).

    Repository initialized.
    
    This project will become an Express + Tailwind app that lets you change the "hello world" text colors from a frontend UI.
    
    Current status: repository skeleton initialized with a basic test.

    - Install dependencies (none required for this initialization step).
    - Run tests: npm test
    
    Next steps: add the Express server and Tailwind setup in following subtasks.
    
  tests/test.js:
    const fs = require('fs');
    const assert = require('assert');
    
    // Check package.json exists and has expected name
    const pkgRaw = fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8');
    const pkg = JSON.parse(pkgRaw);
    assert.strictEqual(pkg.name, 'hello-colors-app', 'package.json name should be hello-colors-app');
    
    // Check README exists and mentions project name
    const readme = fs.readFileSync('README.md', 'utf8');
    assert.ok(readme.includes('Hello Colors App'), 'README should mention project name');
    
    // Check .gi
    ... (truncated)
